word: G3921 - παρεισδύνω - pareisdýnō - par-ice-doo'-no - Creep in unawares

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Creep in unawares
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to enter secretly, slip in stealthily; to steal in; creep in unawares
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3844 and a compound of G1519 and G1416; to settle in alongside, that is, lodge stealthily: - creep in unawares.
